---
title: "Expedition Data: Auto-Gallery"
format: 
  html:
    page-layout: full
    self-contained: true
echo: false
# We tell Quarto to look for all PNGs and store them in a variable called 'my_images'
listing:
  id: image-list
  contents: "*.png"
---

```{ojs}
// 1. Grab the filenames that Quarto found in the folder
// Quarto's 'listing' puts data into an array we can access
raw_data = quatrometa.listing["image-list"]

// 2. Clean the data for the slider
data = raw_data.map(d => ({
  path: d.path,
  title: d.path.replace(".png", "").replace(/_/g, " ").toUpperCase()
}))

// 3. Slider Logic
mutable index = 0

// 4. Auto-Play Timer
timer = {
  while (true) {
    if (autoplay) {
      mutable index = (mutable index + 1) % data.length;
    }
    yield Promises.delay(3000); 
  }
}

// 5. UI Controls
viewof autoplay = Inputs.toggle({label: "Auto-Play Slideshow", value: false})

viewof controls = html`
  <div style="display: flex; gap: 15px; justify-content: center; margin-bottom: 25px;">
    <button style="padding: 10px 20px; cursor: pointer;" 
            on-click=${() => mutable index = (mutable index - 1 + data.length) % data.length}>
      ← Previous
    </button>
    <button style="padding: 10px 20px; cursor: pointer;" 
            on-click=${() => mutable index = (mutable index + 1) % data.length}>
      Next Image →
    </button>
  </div>
`

// 6. The Display
html`
  <div style="text-align: center; border: 2px solid #002f5d; padding: 30px; border-radius: 15px; background: #fdfdfd; max-width: 900px; margin: auto; font-family: sans-serif;">
    <div style="height: 550px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: #fff; border: 1px solid #eee; border-radius: 10px; overflow: hidden;">
      <img src="${data[index].path}" style="max-width: 100%; max-height: 100%; object-fit: contain;">
    </div>
    <div style="margin-top: 25px;">
      <div style="display: inline-block; background: ${autoplay ? '#28a745' : '#002f5d'}; color: white; padding: 6px 18px; border-radius: 50px; font-size: 0.85em; font-weight: bold;">
        ${autoplay ? '● AUTO-PLAY' : 'MANUAL'} — ${index + 1} / ${data.length}
      </div>
      <h2 style="color: #002f5d; margin-top: 20px;">${data[index].title}</h2>
    </div>
  </div>
`
